# unch v0.2.2

`v0.2.2` adds model-aware embedding support for llama.cpp-based runtimes and introduces first-class support for `Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B` GGUF models alongside the existing default `embeddinggemma` flow.

## Highlights

- adds model-specific embedding behavior through a dedicated model interface instead of hardcoding one prompt format for every GGUF file
- supports `Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B` GGUF models in the llama.cpp / yzma pipeline
- switches Qwen3 embedding runs to model-appropriate `last` pooling automatically while keeping `embeddinggemma` on `mean` pooling
- uses Qwen3-style `Instruct` / `Query` formatting for search queries and a separate document format for indexed symbols
- keeps embedding hashes model-aware so indexes built with different embedding prompt formats do not silently reuse the same vector cache entries

## Upgrade notes

- there is no manifest or SQLite schema break in this release
- if you switch an existing checkout from `embeddinggemma` to a `Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B` GGUF file, rebuild the local index with `unch index`
- repositories using remote CI snapshots should rerun the `searcher` workflow after changing the embedding model so the published remote index matches the new embedding format
